document_manager.COMMENT: documents representations on the file volumes stored in our table structure

mds_required_document.COMMENT: A mds_required_document is a document defined in the code, but is not strictly a single file, acts as a default reporting requirement

mds_required_document_category.COMMENT: A mds_required_document_category is fixed tag on an mds_required_document for searching

mine.COMMENT: Unique entry denoting the existence of a mine in British Columbia.

mine_commodity_code.COMMENT: The valid options for a mine commodity type.

mine_disturbance_code.COMMENT: The valid options for a mine disturbance type.

mine_document.COMMENT: an mds record of a document stored in the document manager microservice

mine_expected_document_xref.COMMENT: A mine_expected_document_xref entry is the join between the actual document artifact and the expectation that the document satisfies. an expectation can also be statisfied by multiple documents

mine_location.COMMENT: FCBC staging tables hold up to NUMBER(9,7) for Latitude and NUMBER(11,7) for Longitude.

mine_operation_status_code.COMMENT: This mine_operation_status_code table is the top level in the hierarchy of classifying a mine.

mine_operation_status_reason_code.COMMENT: This mine_operation_status_reason_code table is the second level in the hierarchy of classifying a mine and is one level below mine_operation_status_code.

mine_operation_status_sub_reason_code.COMMENT: This mine_operation_status_sub_reason_code table is the third level in the hierarchy of classifying a mine and is one level below mine_operation_status_reason_code.

mine_status.COMMENT: This mine_status table contains a specific mine's operational status over time.

mine_status_xref.COMMENT: This mine_status_xref table contains a lookup of all valid operational states a mine could be in at a given time. This table is maintained by the business as it contains a hierarchy of valid statuses and reasons.

mine_tailings_storage_facility.COMMENT: Stores the information relavent to a mine tailings storage facility.

mine_tenure_type_code.COMMENT: A valid mine tenure type value to be referenced by mine_type.

mine_type.COMMENT: The intersection of a mine_tenure_type with other mine information, such as commodity type and/or disturbance type

mine_type_detail_xref.COMMENT: A lookup of all valid disturbance and commodity types.

mineral_tenure_xref.COMMENT: A cross-reference to the official Mineral Tenure(s) associated with this mine, via the Owner.

party.COMMENT: Column party_name refers to either a surname for a person or the company name

required_document_due_date_type.COMMENT: A required_document_due_date_type is fixed tag on an mds_required_document for to indicate the rules around when it is due
